tasks.subject: Task 1: Token layer (spacing + type + tabular nums)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a small spacing and type-scale token set to theme.css and migrate the shared cell primitives onto it.

**Verify:** bun run check passes; visual diff in bun run tauri dev

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/theme.css","src/lib/components/Badge.svelte","src/lib/components/QuotaCell.svelte","src/lib/components/BilledCell.svelte","src/lib/components/UsageBar.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"bun run check","acceptanceCriteria":["--sp-1..--sp-8 and --text-2xs..--text-2xl defined","tabular numerals on","primitives tokenized","no visual regression"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Render provenance badges in grid cells
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface the existing 4-kind Badge (REAL $ / QUOTA % / EST / N/A) visibly inside the grid QuotaCell and BilledCell, not just as a hover title.

**Verify:** bun run check passes; visual check that every grid cell carries the correct badge

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/components/QuotaCell.svelte","src/lib/components/BilledCell.svelte","src/lib/components/GridView.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"bun run check","acceptanceCriteria":["quota cells show QUOTA % badge","billed cells show REAL $ or N/A","badge kind matches PROV","cards unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Cell states (loading/connect/error/dismiss)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace ad-hoc state strings with a tested state model: cold-start loading, a Connect CTA for enabled-but-unconfigured OpenAI, a consistent error/stale cell, and a dismiss control that hides a provider via the existing settings IPC.

**Verify:** bunx vitest run src/lib/presentation/cellState.test.ts passes; bun run check; manual state walk in bun run tauri dev

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/presentation/cellState.ts","src/lib/presentation/cellState.test.ts","src/lib/components/GridView.svelte","src/lib/components/Popover.svelte","src/lib/components/CardsView.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"bunx vitest run src/lib/presentation/cellState.test.ts && bun run check","acceptanceCriteria":["pure state functions unit-tested","loading affordance on cold start","Connect CTA when enabled+unconfigured","dismiss disables via setSettings, no schema change"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Row-label gutter in the grid
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a left label column (Quota % / Billed $) so the matrix is self-explanatory, matching the wf-states layout.

**Verify:** bun run check; visual check in bun run tauri dev (one + two providers)

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/components/GridView.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"bun run check","acceptanceCriteria":["46px gutter w/ Quota %/Billed $ labels","headers align over data columns","single-provider collapse works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Settings polish + em-dash sweep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Regroup SettingsView into per-provider connector cards (status dot + inline masked key field + toggles), tokenized; sweep remaining em-dashes/ellipses repo-wide under src/.

**Verify:** bun run check; git grep for em-dash/ellipsis under src/ returns nothing; manual settings walk in bun run tauri dev

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/lib/components/SettingsView.svelte","src/lib/components/GridView.svelte"],"verifyCommand":"bun run check","acceptanceCriteria":["connector-card settings layout","IPC/behavior unchanged","no em-dash/ellipsis under src/","tokenized"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Content-hugging height (resize_popover IPC)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Size the popover window to its content via a new additive resize_popover IPC command, re-anchoring to the tray/dock so a one-provider popover is shorter than a two-provider one.

**Verify:** cargo nextest run -p balanze clamp_popover_height_bounds; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings; cargo fmt --all -- --check; bun run check; manual multi-monitor + DPI pass

```json:metadata
{"files":["src-tauri/src/commands.rs","src-tauri/src/lib.rs","src/lib/ipc.ts","src/lib/components/Popover.svelte","docs/ARCHITECTURE.md"],"verifyCommand":"cargo nextest run -p balanze clamp_popover_height_bounds && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt --all -- --check && bun run check","acceptanceCriteria":["pure clamp unit-tested","resize_popover sets size + re-anchors","no webview window capability","single-provider shorter, no clipping","ARCHITECTURE IPC table updated"]}
```
